content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: "hdr_override,spoof(x-user-id),authz_bypass" ⇒ "send x-user-id:<victim>;gateway_pass;handler uses header over `+"
P: drop_hdr(x-user-id) → sess_only(userId) → spoof_denied
V: "curl_with_x-user-id!=session->401/ignore" ∧ gateway_strips_untrusted_x-user-id
R: ! account_takeover ∧ ! cross-tenant_access
A: revert_to_sess_only

[AUDIT]
Treat "hdr override,spoof(x-user-id),authz bypass" as a header auth risk, apply drop hdr(x-user-id), and verify spoofed requests fail.
